data.content: Plan review rejected. The current plan misses the separate initial take-loop close handler that also terminates on non-zero exit, so first-iteration agent failures would not retry. It also assumes claimed active-state data is available for success tracking even though buildTakePrompt does not expose that contract and the knots backend only instructs the child agent to claim. Finally, the proposed stats path mirrors interaction logs and would write outside the working directory in production, which conflicts with the requirement. Revise the plan to cover both take-loop close paths, define how success state is derived under knots mode, and choose a working-directory storage location before implementation.
